# Ultima IV dungeon: despise
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  30  ladder_both
#   &  40  chest
#   '  70  fountain
#   (  80  field
#   )  81  field_1
#   *  90  room
#   +  91  room_1
#   ,  94  room_4
#   -  a0  altar
#   .  a1  altar_1
#   /  b0  door_special
#   0  c0  kind_c
#   1  d0  door
#   2  d1  door_1
#   3  d2  door_2
#   4  d3  door_3
#   5  d4  door_4
#   6  d5  door_5
#   7  d6  door_6
#   8  d7  door_7
#   9  d8  door_8
#   :  d9  door_9
#   ;  da  door_a
#   <  db  door_b
#   =  dc  door_c
#   >  dd  door_d
#   ?  de  door_e
#   @  df  door_f
#   A  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|FF~FFFFF|
|F!~1~~0~|
|FF~FFFF~|
|F~~~~2F~|
|F+F~FFF0|
|FFF,F$~~|
|F~FFFFFF|
|~~0~~(F~|
== level 1 ==
|F~FFFFFF|
|~3F$~~~~|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~~~~~~~|
|FFFFFFF~|
|~~~~~!F4|
|FFFFFFF~|
|F~~~~~~~|
== level 2 ==
|F~FFF~FF|
|~~F!F~~F|
|~FF~FF~&|
|FF$-$FFF|
|~FF~FF~&|
|~~F$F~~F|
|F~FFF~FF|
|~~&F&~A$|
== level 3 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|~*F$F*~F|
|~FF~FF~F|
|~F!~!F~~|
|0FFFFFFF|
|~~F!F~'F|
|F~~5~~FF|
|F&F&F~~%|
== level 4 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|.)F%F).-|
|F~FFF~F(|
|F~~~~~F(|
|F0FFF0F(|
|F~F/F~F(|
|F~678~FA|
|F~~~~~F%|
== level 5 ==
|FFFFFFF&|
|F$~!F&F&|
|FFFFF&0&|
|F&&&FFFF|
|F&9FF~~~|
|F&&F~+F~|
|FF0F~FF~|
|&&&F~~~!|
== level 6 ==
|FAFFFFFF|
|~!F~~~~~|
|FFF~FFFF|
|~~~~F~~~|
|FFFFF~FF|
|~~~~~~F~|
|FFFFFFF~|
|F$~~~~~~|
== level 7 ==
|FFFFF~F~|
|F'F.~?F<|
|~=F~F'F~|
|F~F@FFFF|
|~:FFF'F~|
|F~F~~>~~|
|F~F~F~FF|
|F!~~F;~~|
# crc32: 6d06192d
